name: @chbrain/khai-engine-persuasion
description: khai persuasion engine — how a persona attempts to change what another believes, values, or does
license: SEE LICENSE IN LICENSE and LICENSE-CODE

khai.tagline: How a persona attempts to change what another believes, values, or does.

card.wire: Link the phase the persona is running (appeal, reception, processing, or outcome) under Projection.
card.issue: What the persuader wants the target to believe, value, or do differently.
card.require: A persuader, a target, and a change the persuader is attempting.
card.enforce: Track which processing route the target is on. Central route change is more durable than peripheral.
card.setup: Name the persuader, the target, the change being sought, and what motivation and ability the target has to process the message deeply.
